Milkshake Mania Wiki

Wiki / Special outcomes

Special blend outcomes

Every milkshake you blend has a chance to come out "special" — paying bonus cash and counting toward achievements and your reviews. Best of all, the outcomes stack on a single shake.

The rolls

Bonus-cash outcomes

These four are rolled on every blend. Rarer ones pay far more.

OutcomeApprox. chanceBonus
Crusty~10%+$10
Baked~5%+$25
Swirled~1%+$100
Golden~0.1%+$1,000

These base odds are improved by upgrades and research (see below), so your real rates climb as you progress.

Quality & presentation

The full set of seven

The game tracks seven distinct special results. Beyond the four cash outcomes above, three more describe a shake's quality and presentation:

Fan Favorite

A crowd-pleaser. Feeds your customer rating and reviews, and counts toward the quality-focused achievements.

Creamy

A perfectly smooth texture — a quality result tracked in your special-outcome distribution on the Stats panel.

Decorated

A beautifully presented shake. Presentation results lift your reviews' "presentation" aspect.

Stacking

They stack

Each special result is rolled independently, so a single shake can hit several at once.

The rarest possible shake is a fully-stacked Fan Favorite Creamy Crusty Baked Swirled Golden Decorated Blend — astronomically rare, and a bragging-rights moment when it lands.

Boosting

Raising your odds

Golden Touch

A special one-time upgrade (Level 8+) that multiplies your Golden Milkshake chance by ×5.

Special Batches

Production research: +5% / +10% / +15% to base special chances across the board.

Golden Formula

Marketing research: +2% / +4% / +6% golden chance.

Fan Favorite Push

Marketing research: +4% / +8% / +12% Fan Favorite rate.

BlendingThe core loop ResearchBoost your odds
